WPEPlatform

API Version: 2.0

Library Version: 2.52.1

Type
Modifiers

Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Enumeration

WPEPlatformModifiers

since: 2.0

Declaration 

flags WPEPlatform.Modifiers

Description [src]

Flags to indicate the state of modifier keys and pointer buttons.

Available since: 2.0

Members

WPE_MODIFIER_KEYBOARD_CONTROL

The Control key.

  • Value: 1
  • Nickname: keyboard-control
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_MODIFIER_KEYBOARD_SHIFT

The Shift key.

  • Value: 2
  • Nickname: keyboard-shift
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_MODIFIER_KEYBOARD_ALT

The Alt key.

  • Value: 4
  • Nickname: keyboard-alt
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_MODIFIER_KEYBOARD_META

The Meta modifier.

  • Value: 8
  • Nickname: keyboard-meta
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_MODIFIER_KEYBOARD_CAPS_LOCK

The CapsLock key.

  • Value: 16
  • Nickname: keyboard-caps-lock
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_MODIFIER_POINTER_BUTTON1

The first pointer button.

  • Value: 256
  • Nickname: pointer-button1
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_MODIFIER_POINTER_BUTTON2

The second pointer button.

  • Value: 512
  • Nickname: pointer-button2
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_MODIFIER_POINTER_BUTTON3

The third pointer button.

  • Value: 1024
  • Nickname: pointer-button3
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_MODIFIER_POINTER_BUTTON4

The fourth pointer button.

  • Value: 2048
  • Nickname: pointer-button4
  • Available since: 2.0
WPE_MODIFIER_POINTER_BUTTON5

The fifth pointer button.

  • Value: 4096
  • Nickname: pointer-button5
  • Available since: 2.0
